<!-- Thanks for contributing to openskills! Please fill this out. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Brief summary. If it adds or changes a skill, name it. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Change to an existing skill
- [ ] Tooling / docs / CI
- [ ] Other

## For skill additions or changes

- [ ] One skill per PR — the change is scoped to a single `skills/<name>/` folder
- [ ] Folder name, `SKILL.md` frontmatter `name`, and `skill.json` `name` all match
- [ ] `skill.json` has a valid `category` from the taxonomy and a bumped `version`
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally and it passes
- [ ] I ran `npm run generate` and committed the updated `marketplace.json`,
      `registry.json`, and README catalog
- [ ] The skill follows the [review policy](docs/review-policy.md) — nothing
      destructive, no secret exfiltration, no weakening of safety controls

## Anything reviewers should know?

<!-- Optional context, trade-offs, or open questions. -->
